'''jagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kinesically|kinesically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kinesically|kinesically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jagate|jagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jagatesher|jagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagatesherĂ«m|jagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jagatero|jagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jagateshĂ«|jagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagateshĂ«m|jagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijagatero|gokijagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijagateshĂ«|gokijagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijagateshĂ«m|gokijagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojagankerom|gojagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojagankeshĂ«|gojagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojagankeshĂ«m|gojagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojagankeya|gojagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jagaterom|jagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagatemu|jagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jagateya|jagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijagaterom|gokijagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijagatemu|gokijagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijagateya|gokijagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jagagate|jagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jagagatesher|jagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagagatesherĂ«m|jagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jagagatero|jagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jagagateshĂ«|jagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagagateshĂ«m|jagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijagagatero|gokijagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijagagateshĂ«|gokijagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijagagateshĂ«m|gokijagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojagagankerom|gojagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojagagankeshĂ«|gojagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojagagankeshĂ«m|gojagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojagagankeya|gojagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jagagaterom|jagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jagagatemu|jagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jagagateya|jagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijagagaterom|gokijagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijagagatemu|gokijagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijagagateya|gokijagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠte|jĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠtesher|jĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠtero|jĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠtero|gokijĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠterom|jĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠtemu|jĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠgĂŠteya|jĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠterom|gokijĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠgĂŠteya|gokijĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafgafte|jafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafgaftesher|jafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafgaftesherĂ«m|jafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafgaftero|jafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafgafteshĂ«|jafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafgafteshĂ«m|jafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafgaftero|gokijafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafgafteshĂ«|gokijafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafgafteshĂ«m|gokijafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafgafnkerom|gojafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafgafnkeshĂ«|gojafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafgafnkeshĂ«m|gojafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafgafnkeya|gojafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafgafterom|jafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafgaftemu|jafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafgafteya|jafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafgafterom|gokijafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafgaftemu|gokijafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafgafteya|gokijafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
